title: Destination Canada Mobility Forum: Attend as an exhibitor - Canada.ca
content:
## Attend as an exhibitor
Canadian employers and organization representatives are encouraged to participate as exhibitors in our information sessions, networking events and recruitment initiatives.
- What to expect from our activities
- How to register Destination Canada Education Destination Canada Mobility Forum
- Destination Canada Education
- Destination Canada Mobility Forum
Canadian employers seeking candidates to fill positions in provinces and territories other than Quebec can participate as exhibitors in information, networking and recruitment events.
Our events give you access to a pool of qualified candidates from around the world. Most of the candidates invited to participate
- will not have a work permit or permanent resident status
- will be eligible for a work permit in the Francophone Mobility stream, which allows you to hire French-speaking or bilingual candidates for positions outside Quebec these candidates do not need a labor market impact assessment
- these candidates do not need a labor market impact assessment
Employers who are unable to participate directly can share their job offers with exhibitors from
- their province or territory
- their city or region
- an economic development agency
- the Réseau de développement économique et d’employabilité
These exhibitors will be able to refer candidates who meet the requirements of your positions.
Participation is not intended for recruitment agencies, lawyers or immigration consultants.

### Organization representatives
Organization representatives participate in Destination Canada Mobility Forum activities on behalf of
- provinces and territories
- Francophone community and settlement organizations outside Quebec
- organizations responsible for educational credential assessments and approved language tests for immigration to Canada

## What to expect from our activities
Our activities are focused on
- providing Francophone immigration information and networking opportunities to candidates
- helping candidates connect with Canadian employers looking to fill positions outside Quebec
Participation is free, but you need to register. We will send you more details about the event after we confirm your registration.

### Find the right candidates
Our events and activities are an opportunity to reach a large number of qualified and motivated candidates who are looking for information about immigration programs and settlement services across Canada.
You can provide support to employers in your province and territory by posting job positions on their behalf.
Candidates may include those who
- are ready to leave for Canada with an open work permit, such as a Working Holiday permit candidates can then come to Canada immediately and start working the day they arrive.
- candidates can then come to Canada immediately and start working the day they arrive.
- are eligible for a work permit under the Francophone Mobility stream
For in-person activities, we provide a booth free of charge.
For online events, we offer access to a digital platform with a space for virtual booths and technical support before and during the forum.
We will ask you to provide feedback on the candidates and inform us of any hires through the Destination Canada Mobility Forum.

### Destination Canada Education
Exhibitors must commit to being actively present online.
Registration is now closed.

### 21st edition of the Destination Canada Mobility Forum
Exhibitors must commit to attending the Mobility Forum in Tunis and Paris, and to actively participating in the online sessions.
Registration is now closed.
We encourage you to visit this page regularly for information on the next edition of the Destination Canada Mobility Forum.
